subject: [ISTANBUL] Use istanbul security waivers
commit_message:
[ISTANBUL] Use istanbul security waivers

Xtesting security docker file in Istanbul still
references master waivers that have been reset
for jakarta.

Use seccom istanbul branch for istanbul

Issue-ID: TEST-378

Signed-off-by: morganrol <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I3e6edda36b103efcecb0b34d983cf3bc5e4e3349

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-istanbul-commit-lint/9/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-istanbul-commit-lint/9/ )

Patch Set 4:

note the ONAP jobbuilder -1 is due to the fact that to build the docker we clone the istanbul repo, not the repo+the patch, so the change cannot be taken into account for the build.
I think we could remove the -1 and force the merge..
Change has been successfully merged by Michal Jagiello
